prose:
Ethylene frontier-orbital gap — DFT, tier `standard` (**B3LYP/def2-TZVP**, density-fit) in PySCF, **gas phase**, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: provided as an XYZ file (`/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/ethylene/ethylene.xyz`), the DFT was a single point on this fixed geometry, not re-optimized. SCF converged in 6 cycles.
HOMO = -7.6155818 eV, LUMO = -0.17986527 eV → **gap ≈ 7.4357165 eV** (Koopmans-style orbital gap, not an excitation energy).
No warnings reported.
